name: Cable Curl
resistance_profile: Constant tension through the whole curl, including the bottom.
execution_steps: Attach a straight or EZ bar to a low pulley and grip it underhand at shoulder width.
Step back so the cable stays taut with your arms extended at the bottom.
Keep your elbows fixed at your sides and curl the handle up toward your shoulders.
Squeeze at the top, then lower under control while keeping tension at the bottom.
good_when: You want constant tension on the biceps through the whole range, including the bottom.
You want a low-fatigue movement to add volume at the end of a session.
bad_when: No cable station is available (use dumbbells or a barbell).
You specifically want a loaded deep stretch (use an incline or preacher curl).
